text: **Anna:** Hello!

**Anna:** {People|人々} from different {countries|国} come here

**Anna:** I have to learn why they come here.
**Sabrina:** This is very {exciting|わくわくする|/ɪkˈsaɪtɪŋ/|The game was very exciting.}
**Anna:** Excuse me, I'm Anna Mateo from The News.
**Anna:** Do you have time for an {interview|インタビュー}?

**Anna:** What is your name?
**Sabrina:** My name is Sabrina.
**Anna:** What {country|国} are you from?

**Sabrina:** That's right.
**Sabrina:** My {nationality|国籍} is Bangladeshi.
**Anna:** Do you like Washington, D.

**Anna:** ?

**Anna:** What do you like to do in Washington, DC?
**Sabrina:** I like {history|歴史|/ˈhɪstəri/|I love studying world history.}
**Anna:** So I like {walking|歩くこと|/ˈwɔːkɪŋ/|I walk to school every day.} around and looking at all the {monuments|記念碑} and {memorials|追悼碑}.
**Anna:** They make {history|歴史} come alive.

**Anna:** The Washington Monument is behind us.
**Anna:** Which is your favorite?
**Anna:** I really like Lincoln Memorial.
**Sabrina:** It is very beautiful.
**Anna:** And it feels like Abraham Lincoln is still alive.
**Anna:** {Awesome|素晴らしい/すごい|/ˈɔːsəm/|That's an awesome performance.}

**Louis:** No, I'm not.
